label: backend ci
command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; echo "==> gofmt"; unformatted="$(gofmt -l .)"; if [ -n "$unformatted" ]; then echo "The following files are not gofmt-formatted:"; echo "$unformatted"; exit 1; fi; echo "==> go mod tidy"; go mod tidy; git -C .. diff --exit-code -- go.mod go.sum; echo "==> go vet"; go vet -waitgroup -hostport ./...; echo "==> golangci-lint"; golangci-lint run --timeout=5m ./...; echo "==> go test (race + coverage)"; if ! go test -race -coverprofile=coverage.out ./... > /tmp/backend-ci-go-test.log; then cat /tmp/backend-ci-go-test.log; exit 1; fi; go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -n 1; echo "==> backend ci passed"'
